w:r.w:t: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN CHỨNG KHOÁN SEN VÀNG
/ Golden Lotus Securities Company (GLS) would like to confirm your account balance at our company at

The value of securities listed in this Balance Confirmation does not include the value of pending rights, is calculated in accordance with the available securities balance in Customer’s account and the par value for “Wait to trade securities”, reference price for the remaining securities on the Exchanges at
This Balance Confirmation will not bear a value as a warranty or an assurance on securities actual value on Customer's securities trading account.
the Cash/Securities balance, excluding financial liability or other payable in the Customer’s securities trading account. We
no responsibility in case the Customer or any third party use the information in this document for the purpose of valuation of assets in the Customer’s securities trading account.
Thank you very much and we look forward to continue serving you.
